\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$) structured growth. \subsection{Information-Theoretic Linkage} Define information entropies for the three primary systems: \begin{align} H_{\mathrm{fib}} &= \sum_{i} -p_{i}\log p_{i}, & p_{i} &\propto \frac{F_{i}}{\sum_{k} F_{k}}, \\ H_{\mathrm{spec}}(N) &= \text{entropy of prism cascade after $
